payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current active memory for Sam from Goldman. It filtered mem_old because mem_old is superseded by mem_new and should not be treated as current.
payload.decision: mem_new was returned because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall system prefers active/current memories and filters memories marked superseded.

payload.intent: Explain the recall behavior for Sam from Goldman, specifically why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered.

memory_cards.statement: Recall selected mem_new for Sam from Goldman because it is the active memory; mem_old was excluded because it is marked as superseded.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present superseded mem_old as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise the supersession link.
If mem_new is inaccurate, update or supersede mem_new with a corrected memory.
If Sam from Goldman refers to a different Sam, split or disambiguate the entity records.
